hero.headline: *Every wire, every outlet* — handled right the first time
hero.subheadline: When Augusta needs electrical work done honest and done well, they call Brown Electric

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Full electrical services
services_section.subheading: From small repairs to complete installations — we handle it all

services.title: Electrical Repairs
services.description: Outlets not working? Lights flickering? We track down the problem and fix it right — no guesswork, just solutions that last.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old electrical panels can't handle modern demands. We upgrade your system to keep your home safe and fully powered.

services.title: New Installations
services.description: Adding outlets, switches, or lighting? We run the wires clean and install everything to code — exactly how it should be done.

services.title: Wiring Services
services.description: Whether it's rewiring an old house or running new circuits, we make sure every connection is solid and up to standard.

about.heading: Augusta's honest electrician
about.body: When you call Brown Electric, you get straight talk and quality work. No upselling, no surprises — just electrical services done right. We've built our reputation in Augusta one job at a time, treating every home like it's our own. Your electrical problems get solved, and you know exactly what you're paying for.

reviews.name: Allclean P.
reviews.text: Henry Brown is incredibly kind and hardworking. Completely honest and trustworthy — I recommend him for any electrical work you need done.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Augusta and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional electrical services throughout the CSRA

cta.heading: Ready for honest electrical work?
cta.body: Call Brown Electric today. We'll give you a straight answer about what needs fixing and what it'll cost — no surprises, just solutions.
